description_long: This is a charming single-story bungalow set on a grassy plot, surrounded by several mature trees and shrubbery. The house features a steeply pitched, dark-shingled gable roof with a prominent front-facing gable above the entryway. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding with stone accents at the base, and a brick chimney rises from one side. A small covered porch with wooden railings and steps leads to the front door, which is flanked by windows. The landscaping includes a winding path, bushes, and a well-maintained lawn, creating a cozy, inviting atmosphere. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped on the sides and others facing the front.
description: A cozy, single-story bungalow with a steep gable roof, stone and wood exterior, covered porch, and surrounded by mature trees and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, winding path, and three large trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the brick chimney, and a large tree dominating the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house mostly obscured by trees, showing the roofline and shaded lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the house's length, rear wall, and a large tree on the left.
